home.title: durchX – Web development, software & IT care in Vienna
home.description: durchX plans, builds and maintains websites, custom software and IT for companies in Vienna and the DACH region – from the first idea to day-to-day operation.

services.title: Services – web development, software, automation & IT
services.description: Web development, custom software, workflow automation, IT support and maintenance from Vienna. Find the right service for your project.

pricing.title: Pricing & engagement
pricing.description: How we work together: fixed-scope project, ongoing care or dedicated development. Transparent models instead of bait pricing – a quote after we understand the scope.

about.title: About durchX – software & IT studio in Vienna
about.description: durchX is a technical software and IT studio in Vienna. We combine careful engineering with clear advice and long-term support.

contact.title: Contact – start a project
contact.description: Let’s talk about your project. Describe briefly what it’s about – we’ll reply with the next steps.

legalNotice.title: Legal notice
legalNotice.description: Legal notice and disclosure in accordance with applicable Austrian regulations.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: Information about the processing of personal data on this website in accordance with the GDPR.

footer.blurb: Websites, custom software and dependable IT care from Vienna – for companies across the DACH region.
footer.placeholderNotice: Preview – business and legal details are placeholders until approved.

hero.headline: Digital products that stay reliable in everyday use.
hero.subhead: And we keep them running reliably — with clean code and clear communication, from Vienna for the DACH region.
hero.note: First conversation with no obligation. A quote only after the scope is clear.

services.heading: From the first sketch to day-to-day operation
services.intro: Five services that work together – use them on their own, or as continuous support from idea to maintenance.

principles.heading: Technology that won’t let you down
principles.intro: We make decisions that still hold up in two years – not just until the next launch.

clarity.title: Clear advice
clarity.body: We explain options and consequences in plain language so you can decide with confidence – no jargon used as a smokescreen.

maintainable.title: Maintainable code
maintainable.body: We build so later changes stay easy. You receive source code and documentation and stay independent.

reliable.title: Dependable care
reliable.body: Launch isn’t the end: updates, monitoring and a named contact keep everything stable.

honest.title: Honest assessment
honest.body: We name risks and effort early, and we’ll say when something isn’t needed. Realistic beats wishful.

process.heading: A clear path, not a black box
process.intro: Every engagement follows the same transparent pattern – so you always know where it stands.

understand.title: Understand
understand.body: Clarify goals, context and scope. The result is a shared picture and a concrete frame.

shape.title: Shape
shape.body: Structure, interface and technical approach take shape as a reviewable foundation.

build.title: Build
build.body: Development in transparent steps, regularly visible and testable.

operate.title: Operate
operate.body: Launch, handover and – if you want – ongoing maintenance and improvement.

engagement.heading: Models that fit your project
engagement.intro: A one-off project, ongoing care or continuous development – we choose the frame together.

cta.heading: Let’s talk about your project.
cta.body: Describe briefly what it’s about. You’ll get an honest first assessment and the next steps – with no obligation.

services.heading: Services for web, software and IT
services.intro: Five services that fit together. Pick an area to see the approach, scope and typical outcomes.
services.ctaBody: Describe your project – we’ll place it and suggest a suitable path.

pricing.heading: Fair, transparent collaboration
pricing.intro: We work with clear models instead of bait pricing. We define the exact frame only once we understand your project – which avoids fantasy figures in either direction.
pricing.consultationHint: Price after the scope is clear
pricing.noHidden: No fake discounts, no artificial urgency, no struck-through prices. Instead, an honest conversation about scope, effort and value.

faq.q1: Why aren’t prices shown on the website?
faq.a1: Because honest prices depend on scope. A blanket number would be either too high or too low. After a short conversation you get a concrete quote.
faq.q2: How can I estimate the cost roughly?
faq.a2: Each model card lists the factors that drive the price. The clearer your project, the more precisely we can place it.
faq.a3: Only if you want ongoing care. We agree scope and cost in writing beforehand, so there are no surprises.

about.heading: A software and IT studio that thinks long term
about.intro: durchX combines development, advice and care. We don’t just build what’s wanted today, but what still holds up tomorrow.
about.story1: Many technical projects fail not on the technology, but on unclear expectations, missing upkeep and solutions no one understands anymore. That’s exactly where we focus.
about.story2: We work in transparent steps, document what we do, and stay reachable once a project is live. The result is technology that holds up in everyday use – not just in the demo.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.body: We take responsibility for the outcome, not just for individual tasks.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: We communicate effort, risks and decisions openly and early.

craft.title: Craft
craft.body: Clean, tested code is our standard, not an upgrade.

continuity.title: Continuity
continuity.body: We think beyond the launch and stay dependably reachable.

about.ctaBody: Tell us about your project – we’ll reply with an honest assessment.

contact.heading: Let’s talk about your project
contact.intro: Describe briefly what it’s about. The more context, the more concrete the answer. You’ll get an honest first assessment and the next steps.

validation.messageTooShort: Please write a little more (at least 10 characters).
validation.consentRequired: Please agree to the processing so we can reply.

success.heading: Thanks for your enquiry!
success.body: Your message has arrived. We usually reply within one business day.

error.heading: That didn’t work
error.body: Something went wrong while sending. Please try again or email us directly.

contact.devNotice: Note: In preview mode the enquiry is logged but not sent until an email provider is configured.

legal.draftNotice: Template – these legal details must be reviewed by a qualified person and completed with real data before publication.

legalNotice.heading: Legal notice
legalNotice.intro: Information pursuant to §5 ECG, §14 UGB and §25 MedienG.
legalNotice.disputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
legalNotice.disputeNote: We are neither obliged nor generally willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
legalNotice.liabilityText: The contents of this website were created with care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the content.
legalNotice.copyrightText: The content published on this website is subject to Austrian copyright law. Any use beyond the limits of the law requires prior consent.

privacy.heading: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This statement explains the processing of personal data on this website in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.dataText: This website is designed to minimise data. When it is accessed, technically necessary server log data is processed. If you use the contact form, we process the data you provide solely to handle your enquiry.
privacy.contactFormText: We use the data entered in the contact form (name, email address, optional details and your message) solely to answer your enquiry. It is not passed on to third parties unless this is necessary to handle the request.
privacy.cookiesText: This website sets no marketing or tracking cookies and embeds no external analytics services, unless this is explicitly enabled and disclosed here.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and objection. You may also lodge a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority.

preflight.heading: Pre-launch status
preflight.intro: This overview is visible in development only. It lists every placeholder that must be replaced with real, approved details before going live.
